Job

Job description

We are looking for a motivated Junior Backend Engineer to join our engineering team. You will help build, test, and maintain reliable server-side applications and APIs while learning best practices for software development in a production environment. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams including frontend, product, DevOps, and QA to deliver robust backend services that power our web and mobile applications.

Required Qualifications

Master's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Information Technology, or related field.

0–2 years of professional backend development experience (internships included).

Basic understanding of at least one backend language: Python / Java / JavaScript (Node.js) / Go / C#.

Familiarity with REST APIs and web service concepts.

Basic knowledge of SQL and relational databases (MySQL, PostgreSQL, etc.).

Familiar with Spring\SpringMVC framework and understand the principles of IOC and AOP.

Familiar with persistence layer frameworks such as Hibernate\MyBaits.

CLINPHARMA Clinical Research LLC provides unparalleled service in contract staffing/consulting and providing high level technical project support for IT, Finance, Pharmaceutical, Biotechnology, Healthcare, CRO and other Life Science companies.  Whether you are looking for a way to accomplish more with your budget while lowering risk through our competitively priced project rates and quality guarantees or need to hire a highly qualified and experienced consultant with little or no notice, CLINPHARMA Clinical Research is always here to support your goals and help you tackle the most difficult challenges.

CLINPHARMA Clinical Research LLC has state-of-the-art technologies and processes that empower our talented core project team to be the best in the world for projects requiring expertise in CDISC, Data Management, Business Intelligence, Project Management, Clinical, Statistical Programming and IND/NDA Submissions and other Information Technologies.
